subcodes.first_line: O beloved ones of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! The candle is lit, and the light of the Covenant beareth witness in the assembly. The fragrances of the gardens of oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای عبدالبهاء شمع روشن است و نور میثاق شاهد انجمن نفحات ریاض احدیت در
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant
